story.iWant: an encrypted local file cache with TTL-based eviction and user-configurable settings stored in appdata
story.soThat: project files can be accessed quickly without repeated downloads while maintaining security with AES-256 encryption and respecting user preferences.

tasks.task: Task 4: Implement User-Configurable Settings in Appdata (AC: 5-6)
Task 7: Implement Cache Clearing on Logout (AC: 9)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: FileCache.set() encrypts blob with AES-256 before storing
FileCache.get() decrypts blob and returns original file
Cache entries have TTL (default 24 hours, configurable per user in appdata)
Cache eviction uses LRU when size limit (1GB default) exceeded
Cache configuration (maxSizeBytes, defaultTTLHours) stored in appdata per user
FileCache.updateConfig() persists configuration changes to appdata
Cache hit rate measured and logged
Cache cleared on user logout (sensitive data removed)

constraints.constraint: IPC communication patterns between main and renderer processes

ideas.idea: Test: FileCache.set() encrypts blob with AES-256 before storing...
Test: FileCache.get() decrypts blob and returns original file...
Test: Cache entries have TTL (default 24 hours, configurable per user in appdata)...
Test: Cache eviction uses LRU when size limit (1GB default) exceeded...
Test: Cache configuration (maxSizeBytes, defaultTTLHours) stored in appdata per user...
